```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(DEoptim)
library(lmomco)
library(DEoptim)
library(tidyr)
```

```{r}
# =====================================================================
# 1. DEFINE PATHS & DIRECTORIES
# =====================================================================
gdrive_path   <- "G:/My Drive"
project_path  <- file.path(gdrive_path, "Academic_git/DownScaling")
data_dir_name <- "QC_d data - Germany" 

# Input and Output Directories
metadata_dir <- file.path(project_path, "Marginals", data_dir_name, "Metadata")
plots_dir    <- file.path(project_path, "Marginals", data_dir_name, "Plots")

# Create the Plots directory if it doesn't exist
dir.create(plots_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# =====================================================================
# 2. LOAD REGIONAL MASTER DATA
# =====================================================================
master_rds_path <- file.path(metadata_dir, paste0(data_dir_name, "_Master_List_Filtered.rds"))

cat("Loading Master Regional Data...\n")
master_regional_data <- readRDS(master_rds_path)
```


```{r}
df<-master_regional_data$Final_Summary

#df<-df %>% filter(Station_ID=="DE_00020")
df<-df[,-c(1)]

df<-df%>%pivot_longer(cols = !c(k_hours,Station_ID),names_to = "Stat",values_to = "Val")


ggplot(subset(df, Stat %in% c("p_zero")), 
       aes(x = k_hours, y = Val, colour = Station_ID)) +
  geom_line()+theme(legend.position = "none")+scale_x_log10()





```

```{r}
df_plot <- df %>%
  filter(Stat == "t2_pos") %>% 
  mutate(k_hours = as.factor(k_hours))

# 3. Create the boxplot
ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = k_hours, y = Val, fill = k_hours)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Mean Values by k_hours",
       x = "k_hours (Time Window)",
       y = "Value") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```
